3076740.name: Mini Dungeon
3076740.description:
Mini Dungeon is a roguelite game focused on exploration and combat, where the goal is to traverse dungeons, face a variety of enemies, and uncover secrets. The game features a completely unique combat system, allowing players to create weapons with distinct move sets. Additionally, it offers the ability to combine elements with each other, generating unprecedented reactions during battles.



In Mini Dungeon, you take on the role of an adventurer from the Mini Guild, an organization dedicated to cataloging the world. Your hero has been given the important task of filling their journal with information about various biomes, materials, weapons, and, of course, all the monsters encountered along the way. With the journal complete, the hero will gain access to forbidden areas, where the greatest dangers and the best rewards await.
3076740.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
